name: Lumbar Spine MRI Without Contrast
description: Standard lumbar spine MRI report template without contrast for evaluation of spinal canal and nerve roots

findings.technique: MRI of the lumbar spine was performed including T1-weighted, T2-weighted, and STIR sequences in sagittal and axial planes.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Vertebral Bodies
sections.content: The lumbar vertebral bodies from L1 through L5 demonstrate [normal height / no compression fracture / no bony lesion]. The bone marrow signal is [normal / no abnormal signal].

sections.name: Disc Levels
sections.content: At each disc level from L1-L2 through L5-S1, the intervertebral discs demonstrate [normal height / no bulge / no protrusion / no herniation]. No significant disc disease at any level.

sections.name: Spinal Canal
sections.content: The spinal canal is [patent / adequate in diameter]. No significant central canal stenosis. No mass lesion in the canal.

sections.name: Lateral Recesses
sections.content: The bilateral lateral recesses are [patent / adequate in size / no nerve root compression]. No lateral recess stenosis.

sections.name: Neural Foramina
sections.content: The bilateral neural foramina are [patent / adequate in size / no foraminal narrowing]. No nerve root compression.

sections.name: Conus Medullaris
sections.content: The conus medullaris terminates at the [T12 / L1 / L2] level and demonstrates [normal T2 signal / no abnormal signal / no tethered cord].

sections.name: Cauda Equina
sections.content: The cauda equina nerve roots are [floating freely / no compression / no abnormal enhancement]. The nerve roots are [normal in caliber / no atrophy].

sections.name: Posterior Elements
sections.content: The posterior elements including the pedicles, laminae, facet joints, and spinous processes are [intact / no fracture / no lesion]. The ligamentum flavum is [not hypertrophied / normal].

sections.name: Paravertebral Soft Tissues
sections.content: The paravertebral soft tissues are [unremarkable / no abnormal signal / no mass]. No paraspinal abnormality.

sections.name: Epidural Space
sections.content: The epidural space is [normal / no mass / no abnormal enhancement]. No epidural fibrosis or lipomatosis.

impression:
1. Normal lumbar spine MRI.
2. No disc herniation, spinal canal stenosis, or nerve root compression identified.
3. The conus medullaris is at normal T12/L1 level.
author: RadReport Templates
